page.title: Motor Yacht Rental Marbella 2026: From €749 on Our 17-Boat Fleet

data.meta_description: Motor yacht rental Marbella 2026 from €749/2h. 17-boat fleet in Puerto Banús. Skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks included. Book your yacht today.
data.summary: Browse 17 motor yachts from €749/2h in Puerto Banús, Marbella. All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and IVA. Book online for 2026.
key_facts: 17 motor yachts from €749/2h (Tier A) to €4,719/4h (Tier B).
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, wine, cava, snacks.
Fleet departs from Puerto Banús; options for 5 to 12 guests.
Tier B yachts (Mangusta 80) include a free jet ski.
Spanish IVA (21%) included in all prices – no hidden costs.
Popular routes: Marbella coast, Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande.
Book via WhatsApp for custom durations and larger yachts.

faq.q: What is included in a motor yacht rental in Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra charges for these items.

faq.q: How much does it cost to rent a motor yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B boats (Mangusta 80 variants) are €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and include a free jet ski. Other yachts are priced on request.

faq.q: Where do the motor yachts depart from in Marbella?
faq.a: All our motor yachts depart from Puerto Banús, the famous marina in Marbella. You can also arrange pickup at Marbella Marina or other nearby points upon request.

faq.q: How many people can a motor yacht accommodate?
faq.a: Capacity varies by boat: from 5 guests (Dubhe, Mariah SX21) up to 12 guests (Mangusta 80, Azimut 58, Canados 86, Ferretti 94, K80). Most mid-range boats hold 9–11 guests.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks on the yacht?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. Our standard provision includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and snacks. We also offer catering upgrades – ask via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for a motor yacht rental in Marbella?
faq.a: The season runs from April to October, with peak conditions June–September (sea temp 22–26°C, air 28–35°C). May and October offer quieter marinas and milder temperatures. Year-round rentals possible with weather check.

faq.q: Do I need a boating license to charter a motor yacht?
faq.a: No. All our charters include a licensed skipper who handles navigation, docking, and safety. You just relax and enjoy the coast.

faq.q: How do I book a motor yacht rental in Marbella?
faq.a: Browse our fleet online, then contact us via WhatsApp for availability and booking. We require a 50% deposit to secure your date, with the balance due 48 hours before departure.

data.body_html:
Motor yacht rental Marbella 2026 starts at €749 for 2 hours on our 17-boat fleet, all departing from Puerto Banús. Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and Spanish IVA – no hidden costs. Whether you want a fast 2-hour spin past the Golden Mile or a full-day cruise to Estepona, our fleet has a motor yacht to match your group size and budget.

Our Motor Yacht Fleet in Marbella

We operate 17 motor yachts from Puerto Banús, ranging from 6.4m speedboats to 29m superyachts. All are fully maintained, insured, and skippered. Here’s the full list:

  • Astondoa 40 – 12.5m, 9 pax, from €749/2h
  • Azimut 39 – 12.5m, 11 pax, from €749/2h
  • Mangusta 80 (Grey) – 24m, 12 pax, from €4,719/4h (jet ski included)
  • Mangusta 80 (White) – 24m, 12 pax, from €4,719/4h (jet ski included)
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge – 17.6m, 12 pax, pricing on request
  • Bandido – 11.5m, 8 pax, pricing on request
  • Canados 86 – 26m, 12 pax, pricing on request
  • Dubhe – 8m, 5 pax, pricing on request
  • Fairline Targa 12m – 12m, 10 pax, pricing on request
  • Ferretti 94 – 29m, 12 pax, pricing on request
  • K80 – 24m, 12 pax, pricing on request
  • Lagoon 380 – 11.6m, 10 pax, pricing on request
  • Mariah SX21 – 6.4m, 5 pax, pricing on request
  • Pershing 46 – 14m, 10 pax, pricing on request
  • Red Tide – 11m, 6 pax, pricing on request
  • Speedboat – 7m, 6 pax, pricing on request

Pricing: Transparent, All-Inclusive

We use two clear pricing tiers for motor yacht rental Marbella:

TierBoats2 hours4 hours8 hours
AAstondoa 40, Azimut 39€749–€2,299
BMangusta 80 (both)–€4,719 (jet ski incl.)–

All other boats are priced on request – just WhatsApp us with your preferred yacht, date, and duration. Every booking includes skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety gear, and 21% IVA. No surprises.

Popular Routes from Puerto Banús

Most motor yacht rentals head west along the Costa del Sol. Common destinations:

  • Marbella coastline – past the Golden Mile, Marbella Marina, and La Concha backdrop.
  • Cabopino – 6 NM west, quiet coves and dunes.
  • Cala del Faro & Cala Cortés – secluded swimming spots near the lighthouse.
  • Estepona – 12 NM west, harbour town with beach clubs.
  • Sotogrande – 18 NM west, luxury marina and polo country.

For a shorter trip, explore the Río Verde estuary or anchor off the Banús sandbank. Your skipper will tailor the route to your preferences.

What’s Included on Every Charter

No add-on fees. Every motor yacht rental Marbella includes:

  • Licensed, English-speaking skipper
  • Fuel for the planned route
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks (olives, crisps, nuts)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

You can bring your own food and extra drinks. Need catering? Ask us about upgraded menus.

Why Book with Us?

We own and operate all 17 boats – no middlemen. Our fleet is based in Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella’s luxury scene. We answer WhatsApp within minutes, confirm availability instantly, and take 50% deposit to secure your date. Reviews highlight our punctuality, boat condition, and friendly skippers.

For a full overview of our entire operation, see Boat Rental Marbella.

How to Book Your Motor Yacht in Marbella

  1. Browse the fleet above and pick your yacht.
  2. Message us on WhatsApp with your preferred date, duration, and group size.
  3. We’ll confirm availability and send a payment link for the 50% deposit.
  4. Balance due 48 hours before departure. We’ll send meeting point details (Puerto Banús).
  5. Show up, meet your skipper, and enjoy the sea.

For custom durations, larger groups, or special requests, just ask. Our team will tailor a package for you.

Frequently asked questions

What is included in a motor yacht rental in Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra charges for these items.

How much does it cost to rent a motor yacht in Marbella?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours and go up to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B boats (Mangusta 80 variants) are €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours and include a free jet ski. Other yachts are priced on request.

Where do the motor yachts depart from in Marbella?

All our motor yachts depart from Puerto Banús, the famous marina in Marbella. You can also arrange pickup at Marbella Marina or other nearby points upon request.

How many people can a motor yacht accommodate?

Capacity varies by boat: from 5 guests (Dubhe, Mariah SX21) up to 12 guests (Mangusta 80, Azimut 58, Canados 86, Ferretti 94, K80). Most mid-range boats hold 9–11 guests.

Can I bring my own food and drinks on the yacht?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own food and additional drinks. Our standard provision includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and snacks. We also offer catering upgrades – ask via WhatsApp.

What is the best time of year for a motor yacht rental in Marbella?

The season runs from April to October, with peak conditions June–September (sea temp 22–26°C, air 28–35°C). May and October offer quieter marinas and milder temperatures. Year-round rentals possible with weather check.

Do I need a boating license to charter a motor yacht?

No. All our charters include a licensed skipper who handles navigation, docking, and safety. You just relax and enjoy the coast.

How do I book a motor yacht rental in Marbella?

Browse our fleet online, then contact us via WhatsApp for availability and booking. We require a 50% deposit to secure your date, with the balance due 48 hours before departure.
